description_long: This hammer features a sleek, elongated body with a dark, stone-like appearance, suggesting it is crafted from a dense, hard material. The overall form is streamlined and tapers at both ends, with one end slightly more rounded and the other more pointed, lacking any visible handle or distinct striking face. The surface is mostly smooth but shows some irregularities, including a visible chipped or abraded area on one side, indicating prior use or impact. The coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with some brownish discoloration and lighter patches where the surface is worn. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and possibly primitive look. The object appears solid and heavy, suitable for use as a blunt-force tool in urban or outdoor settings.
description: A sleek, dark, stone-like hammer with a smooth, elongated body and visible wear marks. It has a utilitarian, primitive appearance with no visible handle or branding.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, showing its elongated, tapered shape and smooth, dark surface.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the end, revealing its rounded, triangular cross-section and solid build.
description_view_2: This side view highlights a chipped or abraded area on the surface, indicating wear or damage.
description_view_3: The hammer is seen from above, displaying its narrow, streamlined profile and subtle surface discoloration.
attribute_handle_type: No distinct handle; the entire object is a single, smooth, elongated stone form with no grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: No distinct hammer head; both ends are tapered, with one end slightly more rounded and the other more pointed, lacking specialized striking faces.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible chipped or abraded area on one side, with some surface discoloration and minor scratches.
